Package neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance

Class AsphalteneMultiMethodBenchmark.MethodResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance.AsphalteneMultiMethodBenchmark.MethodResult
Enclosing class:
AsphalteneMultiMethodBenchmark
public static class AsphalteneMultiMethodBenchmark.MethodResult extends Object
Container for results from a single method.
